mapper.select: SELECT TO_CHAR(CURRENT_TIME, 'DY', 'NLS_DATE_LANGUAGE=KOREAN') AS DAY, SUM(DISTANCE) AS DISTANCE_SUM, SUM(KILOWATT) AS KILOWATT_SUM FROM RASP WHERE CURRENT_TIME >= TRUNC(SYSDATE) - 6 GROUP BY TRUNC(CURRENT_TIME), TO_CHAR(CURRENT_TIME, 'DY', 'NLS_DATE_LANGUAGE=KOREAN') ORDER BY TRUNC(CURRENT_TIME)
